sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first: usually affordable and scalable because practicality matters for staple foods. useful staple energy source because that matters because grains are often judged by how practical they are in real diets. works as a meal anchor because a lot of value comes from being easy to build around.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: easy to overshoot portions because staple carbs can pile up fast without much friction. needs strong pairings to feel complete because the grain rarely finishes the nutrition job alone. carb load is still the main burden because that is the category risk no grain fully escapes.

closing.summary: Whole-Wheat Couscous does have some solid upside. but the tradeoffs keep it from climbing higher. best when you want a staple carb that actually brings something useful with it.
